ab: kanini na wari nu alusu kadaw, uraruma’ lra i wadi na ma’inay.
ch: 今天傍晚，弟弟就要回家了。
en: My younger brother is going home this evening.

ab: marelrang ku kani mulri na vavayan mukuwa i iciba cimima’a da vuyu, padulu mi da keraraviyan pangara kani wadi na ma’inay.
ch: 我和奶奶去市場買雞，我們準備晚餐等待弟弟。
en: My grandma and I went to the market to buy chickens and prepared a delicious dinner for my younger brother.

ab: makalrang mi kana menaniwan da kulakulang, kasaduwan na menaniwan kana ma’ama’at diya na kulang.
ch: 我們經過菜攤，菜攤有好多新鮮的青菜。
en: We passed the vegetable stand, which had a lot of fresh green vegetables.

ab: cimima’ mi da takungkung, tavulaylay di ningzing.
ch: 我們買了空心菜、山藥和胡蘿蔔。
en: We bought water spinach, yams and carrots.

ab: na menaniwan kana vuwa’ i ngidiran na tawki marengay, “nangku re’a di lupas salaw tavu’, kadika cima’ saeman” kema.
ch: 旁邊水果攤的老闆說:「我的鳳梨和桃子很甜。買一些吧!」
en: The owner of the nearby fruit stand said: “My pineapples and peaches are very sweet. Buy some!”

ab: cimima’ mi da re’a di lupas.
makalrang mi kana menaniwan da tiwngan, marengay na tawki “cacima’ mu da eman? ulra a ma’idang di semver na vuyu harem, sasaya mu, telu leman.’’ kema.
ch: 我們經過了肉攤，老闆說:「你要買什麼? 今天的雞又大又肥，一隻300元。」
en: We passed the meat stall, and the boss said, “What do you want to buy? Today's chickens are big and fat, and one is 300 NTD.”

ab: padangal dadu kema i mulri na vavayan, kiumalr kana tawki karuwa diya kemadulu? kema.
ch: 奶奶覺得太貴了，問老闆可不可以便宜一點。
en: Grandma thought it was too expensive and asked the boss if it could be cheaper.

ab: aymu, madulu lra kema na tawki, adi muwai lemehec.
ch: 但老闆說已經很便宜，不能再減了。
en: But the boss said that it is already very cheap and cannot be reduced any further.

ab: tu ’udar na tawki marengay, kadika cima’ kanangku vulraw, nangku vulraw ma’idang di madulu kema.
ch: 隔壁的老闆說，來買我的魚，我的魚又大又便宜。
en: The boss next door said, come and buy my fish, my fish is big and cheap.

ab: likudan lra cimima’ mi lra da vuyu di vulraw, muruma’ mi demeru mi da matemuy a tu na siyaw.
ch: 最後我們買了雞也買了魚，回家煮了一桌子的菜。
en: In the end we bought chicken and fish, and went home to cook a table of food.

ab: mangala mi sawariyan, ’aremeng lra na wari.
en: After waiting for a long time, it was already dark.

ab: padingwa pukuwani marengay i wadi pakunamun lra da adi karuwa semede’ i hitayan kema. nu masalr lra na kasede’an mu, karuwa ku lra muruma’ kema.
ch: 弟弟打電話過來說，軍隊突然不能放假了，要下一個禮拜日我才能回來。
en: The younger brother called back and said that the army suddenly couldn't take a vacation and would not be back until the next Sunday.

ab: sakuwani lra na dineruwan di uwa sa’ulu papiya mukasaya ta mekan nu kemadu. kema i mulri na vavayan.
ch: 奶奶說已經煮了這麼多，叫大家一起來吃吧!
en: Grandma said that she has cooked so much, so let's eat together!

ab: sema’ul mi da wadadiyan, mukasa mi mekan kanani na imaran na keraraviyan.
ch: 我們邀請了親朋好友，一起來享用豐盛的晚餐。
en: We invited friends and family to have a great dinner together.
